evidence: LLDB batch commands were prepared for zero_copy_stream_impl_lite.cc:531-546, but the host lacks debugserver so live stepping could not launch. Fallback state capture against the same prebuilt libprotobuf.a showed skip_count=-1 widened to 18446744073709551615, both Skip() bounds checks evaluated false, and the real CordInputStream instance transitioned from size_=16/available_=16/bytes_remaining_=16/ByteCount=0 to size_=0/available_=0/bytes_remaining_=0/ByteCount=16 after Skip(-1). The call returned false, yet consumed the full 16-byte Cord and left the next read at EOF.
